comment: Expected binary fingerprints for the -O3 Release build. The build is fragile: stale CMakeCache.txt drops CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE silently and falls back to -O2, producing 14340-byte .text instead of 22084-byte .text (2.14x slower, breaks UART handshake timing). run_benchmark.sh now wipes BUILD_DIR before cmake. This file documents the expected fingerprints for the verify_binary target.
